metadata.description: Multi-agent council for Claude Code: six-eyes code review (Claude + Codex + Grok, independent then peer critique), plus autonomous test-gated audit-fix and plan/build — works on any language / any git repo.

plugins.name: council
plugins.description: Multi-agent council: review/deliberate/adversarial (Claude + Codex + Grok), whole-project audit + safe test-gated auto-fix, and plan/build — with consensus, a findings ledger, and a live dashboard.
